query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS i0l0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[1].imageUrl') AS i0l1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[2].imageUrl') AS i0l2, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS i1l0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[1].imageUrl') AS i1l1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[2].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS i2l0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[3].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS i3l0 FROM reviews WHERE id = 600004;
